data.summary: Exploratory validation is blocked due to insufficient evidence.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the lifecycle states of bookings (pending, accepted, rejected, expired), but there is no direct evidence provided that confirms these states are being tracked or validated. The prior steps indicate successful bookings, but they do not demonstrate the presence of the required lifecycle states or any checks against them. This leads to the conclusion that the requirement cannot be confirmed as satisfied based on the available evidence.
gaps: No evidence of lifecycle states (pending, accepted, rejected, expired) being validated or present.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add validation for booking lifecycle states
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete checks to confirm the lifecycle states of bookings.
